title: Sisig Pork Tacos
description: A fusion of Filipino and Mexican flavors, this sisig pork taco recipe combines the spicy, savory flavors of sisig with the crunch of a taco.
instructions: Grill the pork belly until crispy and cooked through.
Mince the onion and chili pepper, then sauté until softened.
Mince the garlic and add to the pan, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, and savory to the pan, stirring to combine.
Shred the pork belly and add to the pan, stirring to coat with the sauce.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the pork mixture onto a tortilla and topping with cilantro.
